author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase 11 implementation begins. Read existing swin.rs (885 lines) + locate prior phase patterns (Phase 4 vit, Phase 9 deeplabv3, Phase 10 inception). Verify roll<T> autograd backward in core. Probe model.named_parameters() before forward. Generate fixture via regenerate_vision_fixtures.py --models swin_t. Add value-parity test, remove 5 #[ignore] markers.
